nodes.title: Station Entrance
nodes.description: You step through the rusted gates of an abandoned transit station. The air smells of old metal and dust. Three passages branch before you — east to the platform, west to an old storage room, and a locked door to the north that bears a glowing security panel.

connections.label: Check the storage room to the west
Approach the locked north door
connections.locked_hint: You need a Security Badge to open this.

nodes.title: The Old Platform
nodes.description: The platform stretches out before you, rails long since corroded into rust. A faded mural covers the far wall — a painted figure of a woman holding a lantern aloft. Something about it feels significant.

connections.label: Cross the platform to the security checkpoint
connections.locked_hint: You need a Security Badge to pass.

usable_items.label: Examine the badge under the mural's light

nodes.title: Storage Room
nodes.description: Shelves of old supply crates line the walls. Most are empty, but one bears a faded sticker of a shield emblem. You pry it open and find a laminated badge inside — a security credential. You pocket it.

on_enter_events.value: Found a Security Badge and 50 credits!

nodes.title: Security Checkpoint
nodes.description: A security automaton clicks to life as you approach, its optical sensors locking onto you. The machine was built to repel intruders. It won't let you pass without a fight.

connections.label: Push through to the control room
connections.locked_hint: You must defeat the automaton first.

nodes.title: Control Room
nodes.description: Banks of dead monitors and dormant consoles fill the room. One terminal still flickers with a faint amber glow. Dust motes drift in the half-light. You notice a sealed door at the back marked PLATFORM ZERO.

nodes.title: Platform Zero
nodes.description: A lone rail car sits on a pristine track, its doors open and waiting. Wherever it leads, there is no coming back to this place. You step aboard.

on_enter_events.value: The doors close. The journey continues...
